what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG search icon as a stroke-only magnifying glass using a circle and diagonal handle path.
observations: SVG root uses xmlns, viewBox 0 0 24 24, width 24, and height 24.
The icon has fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" for inherited color styling.
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
The lens is a circle at cx="11", cy="11", r="6".
The handle is a path from 16,16 to 21,21.
conventions: Uses inline SVG attributes rather than external CSS.
Follows outline icon conventions with no fill and rounded strokes.
Uses a 24x24 viewport matching common UI icon sizing.
concerns: No embedded title or desc element if standalone SVG accessibility metadata is expected.
notes: A compact themeable magnifying-glass icon asset for search affordances.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by consumers or embedded in the SVG asset?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename's implied search purpose matches the magnifying-glass drawing.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, visually lightweight search symbol that adapts to surrounding text or icon color.
contribution: A compact themeable magnifying-glass SVG asset with 24px geometry and stroke-only styling for search affordances.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 stroke-only SVG search icon composed of a circular lens and diagonal handle using currentColor styling.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing search in a reusable icon system while inheriting color from its UI context.
